summary: Iteration 5 testing: 57/57 backend pytest tests pass (6 new protobuf + 12 new candles + 7 regression + 32 old). Frontend verified end-to-end on mobile (390x844): full order flow Dashboard → Options → Order works. Candle chart card renders below live sparkline with 4 interval chips (1m/5m/15m/1D), 60 SVG candle bodies with green/red coloring, Y-axis labels (90.11, 91.53, 93.06, 94.50, 96.11), dashed grid lines, header showing change% (e.g. '-3.10 (-3.25%)'). Interval taps refetch successfully. SL/TGT auto-prefilled LTP-4 / LTP+6 from WS ticks. BUY/SELL buttons functional. Protobuf decoder verified by serializing a real FeedResponse with LTPC.ltp=22150.45 under key 'NSE_INDEX|Nifty 50' → decoder returns {symbol:'NIFTY 50', ltp:22150.45} (reverse-mapped via INSTRUMENT_KEYS).
critical_code_review_comments: Stale Metro bundle was serving the OLD order.tsx (without candle section). After `sudo supervisorctl restart expo` the new bundle picked up — main agent should be aware that adding new imports/components sometimes requires an Expo restart.
Expo warns react-native-svg@15.15.5 expected 15.12.1; not blocking but consider pinning to recommended version for Expo SDK compat.

MarketDataFeed_pb2.py was generated against protobuf 6.31.1 gencode but app runs protobuf 7.34.1 runtime — works because forward-compat is supported. Logged a benign warning from google-ai-generativelanguage transitive dep only (not used).
test_iteration4.py had stale assertion `HAS_PB2 is False` which I updated to `HAS_PB2 is True` (now the pb2 file is generated). Aligned with iter5 reality.
seed_data_creation: None. Orders placed during BUY test get cleaned up by mongo's natural test lifecycle.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Order page testIDs: order-close, order-type-market, order-type-limit, limit-price-input, lot-minus, lot-plus, sl-input, tgt-input, buy-button, sell-button, interval-1minute, interval-5minute, interval-15minute, interval-day. CandleChart renders <svg rect> bodies + <line> wicks; verify with `await page.locator('svg rect').count()`. Candles endpoint: GET /api/market/candles/{symbol}?interval=X&count=N where interval ∈ {1minute,5minute,15minute,30minute,day,week,month}, count clamped to [5,200]. Protobuf decoder lives at upstox_real._decode_feed_frame(buf); to build a test frame: `from MarketDataFeed_pb2 import FeedResponse, Feed; r=FeedResponse(); f=Feed(); f.ltpc.ltp=22150.45; r.feeds['NSE_INDEX|Nifty 50'].CopyFrom(f); buf=r.SerializeToString()`. INSTRUMENT_KEYS keys: NIFTY 50, BANKNIFTY, FINNIFTY, SENSEX. NOTE: If new components/screens don't appear after editing, run `sudo supervisorctl restart expo`.
rca_of_issue: Initial frontend test failed (interval chips not found) because Metro had a cached bundle from before /app/frontend/app/order.tsx was updated with the CandleChart section. Mitigation: `sudo supervisorctl restart expo` forces a fresh Metro start which re-bundles. After restart all 4 interval chips + 60 candle bodies + green/red coloring rendered correctly.
